summary: Video. A 2018 DHS 'If You See Something, Say Something' counterterrorism PSA showing travelers at a hotel valet, a restaurant, and a family at an outdoor party, with a voiceover asking people to stay aware of their surroundings and report suspicious activity to local authorities. It is a narrated awareness spot with no music track. It predates the second Trump administration.
notable_text: Report suspicious activity to local authorities. / If You See Something, Say Something (used with permission of the NY Metropolitan Transportation Authority). / Homeland Security.
